text: 2. Supply and install unit bathroom vanity quartz countertops, backsplash and side splash for all three hundred and forty-six (346) Apartment Units as described in the Contract Documents. All vanity countertops in the Apartment Units shall be 3cm Eased Edge TQ Yukon (G3 OR G4) Quartz and the back and side splashes shall be 2cm Eased Edge TQ Yukon (G3 OR G4) Quartz (ST-50).
